title: desmostachys brevipes var. oblongifolius
intro: Desmostachys brevipes var. oblongifolius, also known as the New Zealand wheki, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, native to New Zealand. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds. The New Zealand wheki offers various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and potentially aiding in the management of certain health conditions. Desmostachys brevipes var. oblongifolius can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, although its uses and preparation methods are not widely documented or commercialized.
